name: git-co-authors
title: Git Co-Authors
description: Manage and copy co-authors for git commits
author: nickradford

commands.name: choose-coauthor
commands.title: Choose Co-Author
commands.description: Choose and copy the 'Co-authored-by:' line for your commit

commands.name: add-or-edit-author
commands.title: Add Author
commands.description: Add an author to the list of authors to select from

commands.name: clear-authors
commands.title: Clear All Authors
commands.description: Remove all imported co-authors from the list

commands.name: load-co-authors
commands.title: Load Co-Authors from Folder
commands.description: Scan a folder for git repositories and load co-authors from all of them

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
